---
title: "Agent-Based Models in R"
short-title: "Agent-Based Models"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "The ODD protocol, existing R frameworks, and building custom ABMs."
keywords: ["agent-based model", "ABM", "ODD protocol", "simulation"]
---

# Agent-Based Models {#sec-agent-based-models}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source(here::here("R", "_common.R"))
```

## Learning objectives {.unnumbered}

- Objective 1
- Objective 2
- Objective 3

## Motivation

<!-- TODO: Concrete problem, why it matters, real-world example. -->

## Theory

<!-- TODO: Definitions, theorems, equations. -->

## Implementation in R

<!-- TODO: 30-60 lines of runnable R code with publication figure. -->

## Worked example

<!-- TODO: Step-by-step walkthrough. -->

## Extensions

<!-- TODO: Further reading, cross-references. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

1. Exercise 1.
2. Exercise 2.
3. Exercise 3.

Solutions appear in @sec-solutions.
